title: Asparagopsis curilla
intro: Asparagopsis curilla, also known as red algae or Irish moss, is a species of marine red algae found in the coastal waters of Ireland and other parts of the world. The health benefits of Asparagopsis curilla include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health due to its high levels of omega-3 fatty acids and other bioactive compounds. The bioactive constituents of this plant include phycobiliproteins, such as phycocyanin and phycoerythrin, as well as other pigments and antioxidants that have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Asparagopsis curilla is commonly used in herbal preparations such as capsules, powders, and extracts, which are often used to support heart health and reduce inflammation.
